sections.paragraph:
ἐπισυντρέχω (hapax leg.; συντρέχω ‘run together’) run together of crowds Mk 9:25.

hapax hapax leg. = hapax legomenon (occurring only once)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 382
